speaker: Narrator
text:
Blanche takes a look at Christina, lying on the floor with her pants undone and a wet splotch on her underwear. She's sleeping like a baby. She was so innocent, so pure looking. 
	
	She could hold her to her chest and yawn.

speaker: Narrator
text:
She woke up. The look in her eyes was the same dull look she had remembered from a Christina that refused to be a person. But, knowing that somewhere inside of her was that. 
	
	She felt a new desire to learn about her.

speaker: Blanche
text: I knew you were an animal.

speaker: Blanche
text: But, I've never been fucked like that before.

speaker: Christina
text: Something about you just brought out the best in me.

speaker: Blanche
text: Will you stick around for some coffee, we'll discuss your progress on the project.
